query:
SELECT hasInternet, hasSim, hasVoip, hasHardware, isByod, rawBundleComponents FROM retail_bundles WHERE id = 1;
SELECT slotType, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM retail_bundle_cost_inputs WHERE isActive = 1 GROUP BY slotType;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT hasInternet, hasSim, hasVoip, hasHardware, isByod, rawBundleComponents FROM retail_bundles WHERE id = 1;
SELECT slotType, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM retail_bundle_cost_inputs WHERE isActive = 1 GROUP BY slotType;
